title: Re ACC and Others: Canllawiau ar gyfer dirprwyon eiddo a materion
body: "Traddodwyd dyfarniad Re ACC and Others (Re ACC and Others [2020] EWCOP 9 Re ACC and Others) gan Uwch Farnwr y Llys Gwarchod ar 27 Chwefror 2020.  Am gyngor pellach:  Swyddfa’r Gwarcheidwad Cyhoeddus  Ffôn 0300 456 0300  www.gov.uk/opg "

taxons.title: Lasting power of attorney, being in care and managing finances
